=Index of exceptions=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\A|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Already_read"| exception Ocsigen_stream.Already_read >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\B|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Bad_config_tag_for_extension"| exception Extensions.Bad_config_tag_for_extension >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Xml tag not recognized by an extension ~(usually not a real error~)
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Cancelled"| exception Ocsigen_stream.Cancelled >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Config_file_error"| exception Config.Config_file_error >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\D|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Dynlink_error"| exception Loader.Dynlink_error >> ~[<<a_api | module Loader >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\E|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Error_in_config_file"| exception Extensions.Error_in_config_file >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Error in a ~<site~> tag inside the main ocsigen~.conf file
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Error_in_user_config_file"| exception Extensions.Error_in_user_config_file >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Option incorrect in a userconf file
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Ext_http_error"| exception Ocsigen_cohttp.Ext_http_error >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cohttp >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Exception raised by exceptions to describe an ~H~T~T~P error~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\F|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Failed_403"| exception Local_files.Failed_403 >> ~[<<a_api | module Local_files >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The requested file cannot be served~: does not exists~, not
    enough permissions ~.~.~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Failed_404"| exception Local_files.Failed_404 >> ~[<<a_api | module Local_files >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The requested file does not exists
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Finalized"| exception Ocsigen_stream.Finalized >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Findlib_error"| exception Loader.Findlib_error >> ~[<<a_api | module Loader >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="IncorrectRegexpes"| exception Extensions.IncorrectRegexpes >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Input_is_too_large"| exception Ocsigen_lib_base.Input_is_too_large >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Interrupted"| exception Ocsigen_stream.Interrupted >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\N|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="NoSuchUser"| exception Extensions.NoSuchUser >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="No_such_host"| exception Lib.Ip_address.No_such_host >> ~[<<a_api | module Lib.Ip_address >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="NotReadableDirectory"| exception Local_files.NotReadableDirectory >> ~[<<a_api | module Local_files >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The file is a directory which we should not display
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Not_concerned"| exception Extensions.Not_concerned >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Regular expressions for redirections
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\O|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Ocsigen_Bad_Request"| exception Ocsigen_lib_base.Ocsigen_Bad_Request >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Ocsigen_Internal_Error"| exception Ocsigen_lib_base.Ocsigen_Internal_Error >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Ocsigen_Request_too_long"| exception Ocsigen_lib_base.Ocsigen_Request_too_long >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Ocsigen_http_error"| exception Ocsigen_cohttp.Ocsigen_http_error >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cohttp >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Ocsigen_http_error"| exception Extensions.Ocsigen_http_error >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Ocsigen_is_dir"| exception Ocsigen_cohttp.Ocsigen_is_dir >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cohttp >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|compute a redirection if path links to a directory
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Ocsigen_is_dir"| exception Extensions.Ocsigen_is_dir >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Stream_error"| exception Ocsigen_stream.Stream_error >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Stream_too_small"| exception Ocsigen_stream.Stream_too_small >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|possibly with the size of the stream
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="String_too_large"| exception Ocsigen_stream.String_too_large >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\U|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="Unknown_command"| exception Command.Unknown_command >> ~[<<a_api | module Command >>~]||
\\
